title: ThrownTNT - RzucaneTNT
description: ThrownTNT adds a fun and customizable way to throw TNT like grenades!
body:
# 🧨 ThrownTNT
ThrownTNT lets players throw TNT like grenades!
Lightweight, customizable, and perfect for survival servers, PvP arenas, or minigames.

## ✨ Features
✅ Right-click to throw TNT instead of placing it

🧱 Cannot be placed like normal TNT

🔥 Custom fuse timer and throw velocity

⏳ Cooldown between throws

📦 Fully configurable crafting recipe

📝 Editable messages with color and HEX support

🛡️ Permission-based access to commands

🔄 /throwntnt reload for reloading config without restarting

### 🛠️ Configuration Highlights
- itemName: Custom TNT name (& + HEX color support)
- 
- velocityMultiplier: How far TNT flies
- 
- fuseTime: How long before it explodes
- 
- throwCooldown: Cooldown between throws
- 
- enableCrafting: Enable/disable custom recipe
- 
Customizable messages:


```
messages:
  throwCooldown: "&cWait &e{time}s &cbefore throwing TNT again."
  tntPlaceBlocked: "&cYou cannot place throwable TNT."
  ...

```

📏 Crafting Recipe
Default recipe:


```
F   F
S T S
F D F
```


Config:


```
crafting:
  shape:
    - "F F"
    - "STS"
    - "FDF"
  ingredients:
    F: FLINT
    S: SAND
    T: TNT
    D: DIAMOND
```


Everything is editable in config.yml.

💬 Commands & Permissions
Command	Description	Permission
/gettnt [amount]	Gives throwable TNT	tnt.admin
/throwntnt reload	Reloads the config	tnt.reload

🧩 Requirements
Minecraft 1.21+

Java 17+

Paper / Purpur recommended

🔗 More
📸 Screenshots included

🌈 Fully customizable and lightweight

Created with ❤️ by Deveusz
